title: koilodepas ferrugineum
intro: Koilodepas ferrugineum, also known as the Indian staff vine or red staff vine, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Koilodepas ferrugineum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Koilodepas ferrugineum is typically prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
